admin.title: Moderation Panel
admin.subtitle: Manage registered accounts, moderator access, and restaurants

admin.courierSelfSignupDisabled: Courier registration is blocked outside this admin panel.
admin.courierEmpty: No courier accounts have been created yet.
admin.pendingCouriersDescription: Couriers created by courier companies must be approved by a moderator before they can sign in to the delivery app.
admin.courierApproved: Courier {name} has been approved and can now sign in to the delivery app.
admin.courierProfileRestricted: Courier personal data is available only to the superadmin.
admin.courierSelectPrompt: Select a courier to open the personal profile.
admin.deleteUserConfirm: Delete account "{name}" ({email})? This will also delete related restaurants and data.
admin.deleteRestaurantConfirm: Delete restaurant "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
